KeyName.description: A searchable identifier of a customer profile.

Errors.description: List of errors for calculated attribute values that could not be retrieved.

ConditionOverrides.description: Overrides the condition block within the original calculated attribute definition.

Errors.description: For information about the errors that are common to all actions, see Common Errors.

CalculatedAttributeName.description: The unique name of the calculated attribute.

DisplayName.description: The display name of the calculated attribute.

AttributeDetails.description: Mathematical expression and a list of attribute items specified in that expression.

Conditions.description: The conditions including range, object count, and threshold for the calculated attribute.

Filter.description: The filter that was used as part of the request.

Statistic.description: The aggregation operation to perform for the calculated attribute.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the calculated attribute definition was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the calculated attribute definition was most recently edited.

UseHistoricalData.description: Whether historical data ingested before the Calculated Attribute was created should be included in calculations.

Status.description: Status of the Calculated Attribute creation (whether all historical data has been indexed.)

Readiness.description: Information indicating if the Calculated Attribute is ready for use by confirming all historical data has been processed and reflected.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

DefaultExpirationDays.description: The default number of days until the data within the domain expires.

DefaultEncryptionKey.description: The default encryption key, which is an AWS managed key, is used when no specific type of encryption key is specified. It is used to encrypt all data before it is placed in permanent or semi-permanent storage.

DeadLetterQueueUrl.description: The URL of the SQS dead letter queue, which is used for reporting errors associated with ingesting data from third party applications.

Matching.description:
The process of matching duplicate profiles. If Matching = true, Amazon Connect Customer Profiles starts a weekly batch process called Identity Resolution Job. If you do not specify a date and time for Identity Resolution Job to run, by default it runs every Saturday at 12AM UTC to detect duplicate profiles in your domains.

After the Identity Resolution Job completes, use the GetMatches API to return and review the results. Or, if you have configured ExportingConfig in the MatchingRequest, you can download the results from S3.

RuleBasedMatching.description: The process of matching duplicate profiles using the Rule-Based matching. If RuleBasedMatching = true, Amazon Connect Customer Profiles will start to match and merge your profiles according to your configuration in the RuleBasedMatchingRequest. You can use the ListRuleBasedMatches and GetSimilarProfiles API to return and review the results. Also, if you have configured ExportingConfig in the RuleBasedMatchingRequest, you can download the results from S3.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was most recently edited.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

IsDefault.description: If set to true for a layout, this layout will be used by default to view data. If set to false, then the layout will not be used by default, but it can be used to view data by explicitly selecting it in the console.

LayoutType.description: The type of layout that can be used to view data under customer profiles domain.

Layout.description: A customizable layout that can be used to view data under Customer Profiles domain.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the layout was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the layout was most recently updated.

EventStreamArn.description: A unique identifier for the event stream.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

EventTriggerName.description: The unique name of the event trigger.

ObjectTypeName.description: The unique name of the object type.

EventTriggerConditions.description: A list of conditions that determine when an event should trigger the destination.

SegmentFilter.description: The destination is triggered only for profiles that meet the criteria of a segment definition.

EventTriggerLimits.description: Defines limits controlling whether an event triggers the destination, based on ingestion latency and the number of invocations per profile over specific time periods.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the event trigger was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the event trigger was most recently updated.

Tags.description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.

Message.description: A message indicating create request was received.

ProfileId.description: The unique identifier of a customer profile.

DisplayName.description: The display name of the segment definition.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the segment definition was created.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

EstimateId.description: A unique identifier for the resource. The value can be passed to GetSegmentEstimate to retrieve the result of segment estimate status.

SnapshotId.description: The unique identifier of the segment snapshot.

JobId.description: The unique identifier for the created upload job.

Message.description: A message that indicates the delete request is done.

DetectedProfileObjectTypes.description: Detected ProfileObjectType mappings from given objects. A maximum of one mapping is supported.

Message.description: A message that indicates the merge request is complete.

Uri.description: The URI of the S3 bucket or any other type of data source.

ObjectTypeName.description: The name of the profile object type.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was created.

LastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp of when the domain was most recently edited.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource.

ObjectTypeNames.description: A map in which each key is an event type from an external application such as Segment or Shopify, and each value is an ObjectTypeName (template) used to ingest the event. It supports the following event types: SegmentIdentify, ShopifyCreateCustomers, ShopifyUpdateCustomers, ShopifyCreateDraftOrders, ShopifyUpdateDraftOrders, ShopifyCreateOrders, and ShopifyUpdatedOrders.

IsUnstructured.description: Boolean that shows if the Flow that's associated with the Integration is created in Amazon Appflow, or with ObjectTypeName equals _unstructured via API/CLI in flowDefinition.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role. The Integration uses this role to make Customer Profiles requests on your behalf.

EventTriggerNames.description: A list of unique names for active event triggers associated with the integration. This list would be empty if no Event Trigger is associated with the integration.

ProfileObjectUniqueKey.description: The unique identifier of the profile object generated by the service.

ObjectTypeName.description: The name of the profile object type.

TemplateId.description: A unique identifier for the object template.

ExpirationDays.description: The number of days until the data in the object expires.

EncryptionKey.description: The customer-provided key to encrypt the profile object that will be created in this profile object type.

AllowProfileCreation.description: Indicates whether a profile should be created when data is received if one doesn’t exist for an object of this type. The default is FALSE. If the AllowProfileCreation flag is set to FALSE, then the service tries to fetch a standard profile and associate this object with the profile. If it is set to TRUE, and if no match is found, then the service creates a new standard profile.

SourceLastUpdatedTimestampFormat.description: The format of your sourceLastUpdatedTimestamp that was previously set up in fields that were parsed using SimpleDateFormat. If you have sourceLastUpdatedTimestamp in your field, you must set up sourceLastUpdatedTimestampFormat.

MaxProfileObjectCount.description: The amount of profile object max count assigned to the object type.

MaxAvailableProfileObjectCount.description: The amount of provisioned profile object max count available.

Fields.description: A map of the name and ObjectType field.

Keys.description: A list of unique keys that can be used to map data to the profile.
